tools.Name: Claude for Financial Services
tools.Description: A comprehensive repository of agents, skills, and data connectors for financial workflows including investment banking, wealth management, and fund administration.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex financial workflows such as market research, DCF/LBO modeling, and KYC document screening.

tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth-patched Chromium browser designed to bypass bot detection systems by modifying fingerprints at the C++ source level.
tools.Use_Case: Web scraping, automation, and AI agent navigation on sites with advanced protection like Cloudflare Turnstile or reCAPTCHA v3.

tools.Name: Local Deep Research
tools.Description: A private, self-hosted AI research assistant that performs deep web and document research with proper citations while keeping all data local and encrypted.
tools.Use_Case: Conducting deep, private, and agentic research across web, academic papers, and private documents with high accuracy.
